programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: When Abishola finds out Tayo has given Dele a credit card, she worries he's being spoiled and becomes stricter with him; worried Abishola is being too harsh, Bob goes behind her back to do something special for Dele.

programme.title: According to Jim

programme.title: According to Jim

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike reluctantly finds himself acting as Ryan's mentor when he is offered a big corporate job; Mandy and Kyle attempt to make Ed's bucket list dreams come true after finding a secret file on his computer.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike surprises Vanessa with a visit from Jen that might last longer than expected; Ryan asks Chuck for advice to impress his new corporate boss on the golf course.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Vanessa asks Ed to revive the Outdoorsman Toddler campaign, she is forced to choose between her two new granddaughters for the ad; Ryan's plan to buy a house on Mike's street hits a snag.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike regrets convincing Joe to use his inheritance money to buy a classic jeep when he realizes how he intends to restore it; Kristin and Ryan worry that Mandy and Kyle are teaching Sarah bad language.

programme.desc: Adam encourages Don to give himself food poisoning to get out of babysitting his destructive grandson; Adam and Andi argue over who has to take Kate and her teenage friends dress shopping.

programme.sub-title: Diamonds Are a Ghoul's Best Friend

programme.title: According to Jim

programme.desc: Brad announces his plans to marry a college woman, but Tim and Jill try to convince him he's too young.

programme.desc: Tim and Jill rent their second house to Al, who proves to be a difficult tenant; Randy and Brad buy the same shirt.

programme.desc: During the grand opening of The Outdoor Man Grill, Kristin feels like Ed is undermining her role as manager; Eve tries to distance herself from a childhood friend who appears to have a crush on her.
